---
title: "Welcome"
---

```{=html}
<div style="width:100%; display:flex; justify-content:center;">
  <img src="images/lablogo.svg" alt="McPherson Lab logo" style="width:100%; max-width:1200px; height:auto; border-radius:20px; margin-bottom:2rem; display:block;" />
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="page-navigation">
  <div></div>
  <div>
    <a href="about/index.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary">About <i class="bi bi-arrow-right"></i></a>
  </div>
</div>
```
